activation_desc: Click the <Register Device> button and scan the QR-code from your service sheet in the window that opens.
errors_no_camera_access: Camera access required. Please allow camera access in your browser settings.
errors_session_expired: Session expired. Please register the device again.
errors_save_error: Failed to save code. Please try again.
messages_activation_success: Device registered successfully! You can now start scanning.
